question.text: A trader buys 15 lots of GBPINR futures at 104.00 and sells at 105.25. What is the total profit?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Profit = (105.25 - 104.00) × 1000 × 15 = 1.25 × 15,000 = Rs. 18,750. **The Trap:** GBPINR lot size is 1000 GBP (same as USDINR). Multiply price difference by lot size by number of lots. **Cross-Exam Context:** P&L calculations across different currency pairs are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** GBPINR has higher absolute values than USDINR, so the same percentage move generates higher absolute P&L per lot.
